schemaHint: 可选字段：installCommands(数组) 直接指定命令；或 packageFile/installerType(msi|exe|zip)/silentArgs 指定离线安装包；zip 可配 targetDir 指定解压目录；可选 downloadUrl/sha256 用于缺包时自动下载与校验；可选 postInstallCommands(数组) 做安装后配置；可选 detectCommands(数组) 用命令检测是否已安装。
notes: 用于标识安装包与安装策略的元信息（可按需扩展字段）

python.name: Python
python.notes: 绿色版（embeddable zip）解压安装 + PATH 置顶；可选 pipBootstrap + extraFiles（get-pip.py/whl）实现离线 pip

pycharm.name: PyCharm
pycharm.notes: 离线安装包（如需检测已安装，请按实际安装路径补 detectCommands）

mysql.name: MySQL
mysql.notes: 绿色版 zip 解压安装：初始化 data + 安装/启动服务(MySQL80) + 写死 root 密码
postInstallCommands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root='C:\Program Files\MySQL';$pw='123456';$d=Get-ChildItem -Directory $root -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|?{$_.Name -like 'mysql-*winx64*'}|select -First 1;$base=if($d){$d.FullName}else{$root};$bin=Join-Path $base 'bin';$mysqld=Join-Path $bin 'mysqld.exe';$mysqladmin=Join-Path $bin 'mysqladmin.exe';$data=Join-Path $base 'data';New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $data|Out-Null;$ini=Join-Path $base 'my.ini';if(-not(Test-Path $ini)){$lines=@('[mysqld]',('basedir='+$base),('datadir='+$data),'port=3306','');Set-Content -Encoding ASCII -Path $ini -Value $lines};if(-not(Test-Path (Join-Path $data 'mysql'))){& $mysqld --initialize-insecure --basedir="$base" --datadir="$data";if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'mysqld init failed'}};if(-not(Get-Service -Name 'MySQL80' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)){& $mysqld --install MySQL80 --defaults-file="$ini";if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'service install failed'}};try{Start-Service -Name MySQL80 -ErrorAction Stop}catch{};Start-Sleep -Seconds 2;& $mysqladmin -u root status 2>$null;if($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0){& $mysqladmin -u root password $pw;if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'set password failed'}}"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root='C:\Program Files\MySQL';$d=Get-ChildItem -Directory $root -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|?{$_.Name -like 'mysql-*winx64*'}|select -First 1;$base=if($d){$d.FullName}else{$root};$bin=Join-Path $base 'bin';$path=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','Machine');$parts=$path -split ';' | Where-Object {$_ -and $_ -ne $bin};$new=($bin)+$parts;[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path',($new -join ';'),'Machine');Write-Output ('已将 MySQL bin 置顶到 PATH: '+$bin)"

redis.name: Redis
redis.notes: 绿色版 zip 解压安装：安装/启动服务(Redis) + PATH 置顶（需使用支持 Windows Service 的 redis-server.exe 发行包）
postInstallCommands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root='C:\Program Files\Redis';$exe=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Recurse -Filter redis-server.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if(-not $exe){throw 'redis-server.exe not found'}; $bin=Split-Path $exe; $path=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','Machine');$parts=$path -split ';' | Where-Object {$_ -and $_ -ne $bin};$new=($bin)+$parts;[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path',($new -join ';'),'Machine');$conf=Join-Path $bin 'redis.windows.conf';$data=Join-Path $root 'data';New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $data|Out-Null; if(-not(Test-Path $conf)){$lines=@('port 6379',('dir '+$data),('logfile '+(Join-Path $root 'redis.log')),'');Set-Content -Encoding ASCII -Path $conf -Value $lines}; if(-not(Get-Service -Name 'Redis' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)){& $exe --service-install $conf; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'redis service install failed'}}; try{Start-Service -Name Redis -ErrorAction Stop}catch{& $exe --service-start; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'redis service start failed'}}"
